form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding by Mastercraftsman out of Monte Solaro has taken a long time to make it to the track. Having his first start today. Making race debut here. Watch the market closely as he hails from the in-form Willie Mullins yard.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Five-year-old gelding by Mastercraftsman out of Monte Solaro has taken a long time to make it to the track. Having his first start today. Making race debut here. Watch the market closely as he hails from the in-form Willie Mullins yard.

form.formComment: Useful type. Last start finished second of 25 starters at Fairyhouse on April 4 over 4023m, 3.5 len behind Midnight Jet carrying 75.5kg at $4. The run before finished third of 21 runners at Leopardstown in the LR on February 2 over 4828m, on heavy track; 15 len behind Saint Le Fort carrying 65.5kg at $8. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after three months pulled up at Cheltenham in the G1 Spa Novices Hurdle on March 13 over 4828m. Previously second-up finished third of 9 starters at Cheltenham in the G2 Hyde Novices' Hurdle on November 14 over 4224m, on slow going 3.5 len behind No Drama This End carrying 71kg at $13. Forgive first-up failure. Capable type and should be right in the mix.

form.formComment: Last run pulled up at Cork on March 19 over 4828m. Start before finished sixth of 7 starters at Punchestown on February 4 over 3822m, 13 len behind Agameoftwohalves with 72kg at $8. Needs to regain punters' trust.

form.formComment: Last outing finished fifth of 12 runners at Wexford on April 10 over 4023m, 60 len behind Le Moulin Rouge with 75.5kg at $101. Race before didn't finish the race at Clonmel on April 2 over 3922m. Confidence looks to be down.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after three months finished fifth of 13 runners at Cork on April 6 over 4626m, 19 len behind Oaks Soldier carrying 75.5kg at $151. Previously second-up finished 19th of 21 starters at Punchestown on November 13 over 4123m, in the wet; 39 len behind It's Never Simple carrying 69kg at $81. Disappointing again last time and looks safely held.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished third in a small field at this track on February 10 over 3118m, on a wet track; 57 len behind Tip Of The Wings with 73kg at $29. Second run from a spell finished eighth of 14 starters at Naas on March 8 over 3822m, 32 len behind Healys Pub carrying 75.5kg at $81. Hard to have on recent efforts.
